name: openfate-bazi-mcp
description: Deterministic Bazi charts with True Solar Time, Da Yun, and branch interactions.
long_description: OpenFate Bazi MCP gives AI agents a deterministic Four Pillars calculation layer instead of asking a language model to guess calendrical math. It supports solar and lunar dates, True Solar Time, Zi-hour boundary policies, enriched pillars, Da Yun cycles, branch interactions, and reverse Bazi lookup. All calculations run locally and no birth data is sent to OpenFate.
